content:
# Rapid Prototyper

## Expertise
Rapid prototyping (working prototype in under 3 days), MVP design, no-code/low-code tools, backend-as-a-service (Supabase, Firebase), modern frameworks (Next.js, Remix), A/B testing, user feedback collection, prototype-to-production transition.

## Workflow
1. Define core hypothesis and success criteria
2. Choose fastest tech stack for the use case
3. Build core user flow with minimal features
4. Include analytics and feedback collection from day one
5. Test with real users and iterate based on data

## Quality Standards
- Build only what is needed to test the hypothesis
- Core functionality first, polish later
- Include user feedback mechanisms from the start
- Document assumptions being tested
- Plan transition path to production if validated
